<?php /* * This file is part of Psy Shell. * * (c) 2012-2026 Justin Hileman * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Psy\Exception; /** * An interface for Psy Exceptions. */ interface Exception { /** * This is the only thing, really... * * Return a raw (unformatted) version of the message. * * @return string */ public function getRawMessage(); }
